package engine

// This fixture simulates an untyped []string field inside the engine package
// WITHOUT the fitness:allow-untyped-args exemption marker.
// The fitness script (FF-08) negative-greps for \b\[\]string\b in engine/*.go
// and excludes only lines marked with // fitness:allow-untyped-args env-allowlist.

// VIOLATION: raw []string field without the exemption marker.
type BadRequest struct {
	ArbitraryArgs []string
}
